ops.title: Track S: synckit + cookiesync + reposync + host cutover
ops.description: Last. synckit rpc keeps frozen bytes + exclusive-dispatch semantics, rides wire.* + trust.Policy underneath; synckitd deleted, per-app service.Agent as if always so. Preserved-semantics list (plan Track S) proven beyond goldens. Cutover: publish daemonkit → synckit → both consumers FIRST, then per-host ssh runbook (inventory + TCC surface → install without conflicting listeners → bootout synckitd FIRST → start per-app agents → verify version/identity/trust/function → remove old). Squatter recovery per decision note. proc.Backoff adopted here or deleted.

ops.text: synckit goldens + preserved-semantics tests (tombstones, monotone writes, exclusive dispatch, exit-255, anti-echo) green
cookiesync/reposync live converge on per-app agents
Both hosts cut over via runbook: squatter check clean, TCC surfaces verified, synckitd removed
